title: Dependencies across multiple boards
excerpt:
Hello, 
I can see how we add in dependencies for various items on one board.

posts.author: slash (Sharon Lashbrooke)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

I can see how we add in dependencies for various items on one board.

I was wondering if you can link the dependencies between multiple boards?

We are running a number of large projects and that each require their own board. However, there are key items between the projects that are dependant upon each other.

Thank you
Sharon

posts.author: PedroM (Pedro Malaga - monday.com Certified Partner)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @slash,

You can use the link and mirroring column to get data from other boards. For instance, you can have one project set up with all the dependecies at board level. If one task depends on other project, you can link that activity to the ones related in the other project and get also its timeline view. Then, you can compare both timelines and update the dependent one when needed. In this example I should update “Manufacture products” pushing it one day.
At this time, it’s not possible to manage mirrored columns with automations so you will have to perform the comparasion and updates manually.

2020-05-01 (1)1300×197 29.7 KB

Now with the multiboard link, you can link multiple boards:
https://community.monday.com/t/multi-board-item-links-alpha-version-is-out/2842/103

Hope it helps.

posts.author: roche8cb (Collin Roche)
posts.cookedHtml: Any update on this? The fact that you can have several boards within a space begs for the ability to set dependencies between boards. This feature would justify my use of this product for the next 5-6 years on a relatively large scale.

posts.author: itaishabtai (itai shabtai)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @roche8cb ! Unfortunately, there is currently no ETA or when corss-board dependencies will be supported but this is definitely something we have under our radar!

Best,
Itai

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.

cc @roche8cb

posts.author: ainun (ainun syahida)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hii @rodneyz I used same item multiple boards apps on monday, and this could be very helpful knowing that this apps can set the dependencies across multiple boards. however your attachment link somehow can’t be open (a broken link probably). could you me the right link about how to set up dependencies across multiple board using same item multiple board apps?

thanks appreciate it!

posts.author: JDer (Daniel Jackman)
posts.cookedHtml: It usually involves setting up cross-board links or dependencies in your project management tool. For instance, tools like Jira or Asana let you create links between issues or tasks across different boards.
